Description:
Increases <UIForeground>F201F4</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201F5</UIGlow>Powder Gauge<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground> capacity to 3 <UIForeground>F201FA</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201FB</UIGlow>Cartridges<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground>. While under the effect of <UIForeground>F201FA</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201FB</UIGlow>Bloodfest<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground>, increases the maximum capacity to 6.
Executing <UIForeground>F201F4</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201F5</UIGlow>Bloodfest<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground> stores 3 <UIForeground>F201FA</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201FB</UIGlow>Cartridges<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground>.

Grants <UIForeground>F201FA</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201FB</UIGlow>Prefulgence Ready<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground> upon consuming all stacks of <UIForeground>F201FA</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201FB</UIGlow>Manafication<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground>.
<UIForeground>F201F8</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201F9</UIGlow>Duration: <UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground>30s

Grants <UIForeground>F201FA</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201FB</UIGlow>Prefulgence Ready<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground> upon executing <UIForeground>F201FA</UIForeground><UIGlow>F201FB</UIGlow>Manafication<UIGlow>01</UIGlow><UIForeground>01</UIForeground>.
